system.flavor: Your strike is a clarion call to the forest, the plains, and the deep places of the Green, bringing forth their denizens to fight for you.
system.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d3
On hit [X]: At the end of your turn, summon one or (5+) two beasts in free adjacent space to your target.

[Beast — Summon (4)]
Summon action 3, then deal 2 damage to an adjacent foe. Increase to 2d3 against foes in crisis. Then, dismiss the beast.
Heavy twice as many beasts.
